form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Last start finished second of 11 runners at Exeter on March 17 over 4340m, 4 len behind Snapdance carrying 67.5kg at $4.50. Run before raced on the speed and boxed on steadily finished second of 7 runners at Exeter on February 20 over 4300m, on a wet track; 4 len behind Bredon Hill Dart carrying 76kg at $2.20. Looks very hard to beat.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; having raced just once last preparation ran last at Ascot on December 20 over 4700m, 73 len behind Jakar Du Moulin carrying 70kg at $26. When resuming last campaign finished third in a small field at Chepstow on April 21 over 4700m, 28 len behind Deep Purple carrying 73.5kg at $13. Capable and looks a top-three chance.

form.formComment: Freshened for 30 days. Last start finished second of 7 runners at Sedgefield on March 10 over 4000m, 1.0 len behind Wind Your Neck In carrying 75.5kg at $3. Start before finished ninth of 12 runners at Leicester on January 20 over 3100m, on rain affected going; 31 len behind Seaview Rock with 73.5kg at $101. Can return to the winner's list.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth of 12 runners at Wincanton on March 23 over 4000m, 8 len behind Jackomy carrying 69.5kg at $67. The start before that; pulled up at this track on February 26 over 3800m. No surprise to see him back in form today.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6.5). Last start finished sixth of 12 runners at Wincanton on March 23 over 4000m, 8 len behind Jackomy carrying 69.5kg at $67. The start before that; pulled up at this track on February 26 over 3800m. No surprise to see him back in form today.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after two months pulled up at Huntingdon on March 18 over 5000m. Previously second-up ran on from midfield to post a big 7 len win. Wincanton on December 4 over 4900m defeating West Orchard carrying 63kg at $4 in a hurdle. Not likely to threaten in this field.

form.formComment: Resuming after 13 months. Finished off last campaign 2 of 9 starters at Chepstow March 20 2025 over 4700m, 8 len behind Redbridge Rambler with 67kg at $5.50. When resuming last campaign 12 of 15 runners at Chepstow October 29 2024 over 3900m, slow track; 100 len behind Holly Hartingo with 66.5kg at $21. Expected to take beating.
